results.title: Book an available training session with optional notes and receive success feedback
results.goal_prompt:
You are testing the gym-web application.

TEST: Book an available training session with optional notes and receive success feedback
PURPOSE: Verifies a member can book an available time slot from the Booking page using the confirmation dialog and sees a success message.

Starting URL: https://frontend-five-gray-qfx32igab7.vercel.app

Execute these steps IN ORDER. For each step, record success/failure.
If a step fails, STOP and report which step failed.

STEPS:
  Step 1 [ACTION]: Navigate to https://frontend-five-gray-qfx32igab7.vercel.app/login
  Step 2 [ACTION]: Type "member@gym.com" into the email/username field
  Step 3 [ACTION]: Type "123456789" into the password field
  Step 4 [ACTION]: Click the "Login" button
  Step 5 [CHECK]: Verify URL contains "/booking"
  Step 6 [ACTION]: Click on an available time slot button
  Step 7 [ACTION]: Type "Looking forward to this session" into the notes field in the booking confirmation dialog
  Step 8 [ACTION]: Click the "Book Session" button
  Step 9 [CHECK]: Verify text "success" is visible

IMPORTANT: Return result as JSON with EXACTLY this structure:
{
  "test_passed": true/false,
  "steps_completed": <number>,
  "total_steps": 9,
  "step_results": [
    {
      "step_number": 1,
      "type": "action" or "assertion",
      "description": "what was done/checked",
      "success": true/false,
      "xpath": "/html/body/..." or null,
      "error": null or "description"
    }
  ],
  "final_url": "URL when test ended",
  "summary": "brief summary"
}

For each step, include the XPath of the element you interacted with or checked.
Return ONLY the JSON object.

step_results.error: The URL redirected to /dashboard instead of /booking after login.

resultJson.summary: The test failed at Step 5 because the application redirected the user to the dashboard page (/dashboard) instead of the expected booking page (/booking) after a successful login.
